  1. org.key_project.logic.op.sv

Uses of Interface
org.key_project.logic.op.sv.SchemaVariable

Packages that use SchemaVariable
Package
Description
de.uka.ilkd.key.informationflow.rule
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.java
This package contains classes that cover the Java programming language.
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.reference
Elements of the Java syntax tree representing implicit or explicit (named) references to other program elements.
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.visitor
contains classes representing visitors traversing the tree structure of Java programs.
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic
provides a representation for the term structure.
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op
contains the operators of JTerms.
de.uka.ilkd.key.nparser
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.nparser.builder
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.pp
This package contains pretty-printing functionality used by the GUI and for saving proofs.
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof
This package contains the core data structures of proofs, nodes, goals, as well as machinery to deal with these data structures.
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io
Classes related to loading and saving proof files.
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule
This package contains classes for implementing rules.
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.conditions
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.executor.javadl
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.inst
contains classes for the instantiation of schema variables of Taclets.
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.match.vm
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.match.vm.instructions
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.metaconstruct
contains classes representing the meta constructs of Taclets.
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.tacletbuilder
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.taclettranslation.assumptions
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.taclettranslation.lemma
 
org.key_project.logic.op.sv
 
org.key_project.prover.rules
 
org.key_project.prover.rules.conditions
 
org.key_project.prover.rules.instantiation
 
org.key_project.prover.rules.tacletbuilder

  • Uses of SchemaVariable in de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op

    Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op that implement SchemaVariable
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    FormulaSV
    A schema variable that is used as placeholder for formulas.
    class 
    JOperatorSV
    Abstract base class for schema variables.
    final class 
    ModalOperatorSV
    Schema variable matching modal operators.
    final class 
    ProgramSV
    Objects of this class are schema variables matching program constructs within modal operators.
    final class 
    SkolemTermSV
    Schema variable that is instantiated with fresh Skolem constants.
    final class 
    TermLabelSV
    A schema variable which matches term labels
    final class 
    TermSV
    A schema variable that is used as placeholder for terms.
    final class 
    UpdateSV
    A schema variable that is used as placeholder for updates.
    final class 
    VariableSV
    Schema variable that is instantiated with logical variables.

    Namespace<@NonNull QuantifiableVariable>
    TacletApp.extendVarNamespaceForSV(Namespace<@NonNull QuantifiableVariable> var_ns, SchemaVariable sv)
    creates a new variable namespace by adding names of the instantiations of the schema variables in the context of the given schema variable and (if the TacletApp's prefix has the context flag set) by adding names of the logic variables of the context.
    SchemaVariable
    Taclet.getNameCorrespondent(SchemaVariable p, Services services)
    Find a schema variable that could be used to choose a name for an instantiation (a new variable or constant) of "p"
    boolean
    TacletApp.isInstantiationRequired(SchemaVariable sv)
    returns true if the given SchemaVariable must be explicitly instantiated it does not check whether sv is already instantiated or not
    TacletPrefix
    TacletPrefix.put(SchemaVariable var)
    creates a new TacletPrefix with a new prefix entry
    TacletPrefix
    TacletPrefix.remove(SchemaVariable var)
    removes a SchemaVariable from the prefix
    protected static SVInstantiations
    TacletApp.replaceInstantiation(Taclet taclet, SVInstantiations insts, SchemaVariable varSV, Services services)
    returns a new SVInstantiations that modifies the given SVInstantiations insts at the bound SchemaVariable varSV to a new LogicVariable.

    FindTaclet(Name name, TacletApplPart applPart, ImmutableList<TacletGoalTemplate> goalTemplates, ImmutableList<RuleSet> ruleSets, TacletAttributes attrs, SyntaxElement find, ImmutableMap<@NonNull SchemaVariable, TacletPrefix> prefixMap, ChoiceExpr choices, ImmutableSet<TacletAnnotation> tacletAnnotations)
    creates a FindTaclet

    creates a Taclet (previously Schematic Theory Specific Rule) with the given parameters.
     
    RewriteTaclet(Name name, TacletApplPart applPart, ImmutableList<TacletGoalTemplate> goalTemplates, ImmutableList<RuleSet> ruleSets, TacletAttributes attrs, JTerm find, ImmutableMap<@NonNull SchemaVariable, TacletPrefix> prefixMap, ChoiceExpr choices, boolean surviveSymbExec, ImmutableSet<TacletAnnotation> tacletAnnotations)
     
     
    RewriteTaclet(Name name, TacletApplPart applPart, ImmutableList<TacletGoalTemplate> goalTemplates, ImmutableList<RuleSet> ruleSets, TacletAttributes attrs, JTerm find, ImmutableMap<@NonNull SchemaVariable, TacletPrefix> prefixMap, ChoiceExpr choices, ImmutableSet<TacletAnnotation> tacletAnnotations)
    creates a Schematic Theory Specific Rule (Taclet) with the given parameters that represents a rewrite rule.
     
    SuccTaclet(Name name, TacletApplPart applPart, ImmutableList<TacletGoalTemplate> goalTemplates, ImmutableList<RuleSet> heuristics, TacletAttributes attrs, Sequent find, ImmutableMap<SchemaVariable, TacletPrefix> prefixMap, ChoiceExpr choices, ImmutableSet<TacletAnnotation> tacletAnnotations)
    creates a Taclet (old name Schematic Theory Specific Rule) with the given parameters that works on the succedent.
    protected
    Taclet(Name name, SyntaxElement find, TacletApplPart applPart, ImmutableList<TacletGoalTemplate> goalTemplates, ImmutableList<RuleSet> ruleSets, TacletAttributes attrs, ImmutableMap<@NonNull SchemaVariable, TacletPrefix> prefixMap, ChoiceExpr choices, boolean surviveSmbExec, ImmutableSet<TacletAnnotation> tacletAnnotations)
    creates a Taclet (originally known as Schematic Theory Specific Rules)

    Constructor
    Description
     
    ApplyUpdateOnRigidCondition(UpdateSV u, SchemaVariable phi, SchemaVariable result)
    Creates an instance of the variable condition.
     
    ArrayComponentTypeCondition(SchemaVariable var, boolean checkReferenceType)
    creates an instance of this condition checking if array var has reference or primitive component type depending on the value of checkReferenceType

    ArrayTypeCondition(SchemaVariable var, boolean negated)
    creates an instance of this condition checking if an instantiation of a schema variable is an array or not
